name: scott-dev-skills
description: Codex-native development skills for audits, walkthroughs, pipelines, prompt quality, context discipline, and optional gate templates.

interface.shortDescription: A Codex development skill suite for evidence-first delivery.
interface.longDescription: ScottDevSkills consolidates Scott Converse's reusable Codex development workflows: scoped and full audits, Playwright walkthroughs, manifest-driven agent pipelines, prompt quality checks, context discipline, and optional gate templates.
defaultPrompt: Audit this recent fix with audit-lite.
Run a full release readiness audit.
Walk through this UI and check what is really wired.
Initialize or resume an agent pipeline run.
